# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create Envoy configuration with HTTP filters for request processing. Define filter chains including router filter for traffic routing. Set up retry policies and timeout configurations for backend connections. This is for our service mesh data plane.
# Category: envoy_authz_filter_missing

admin:
  access_log_path: /var/log/envoy/admin_access.log
  access_logger:
    stats_sinks:
      - name: admin_access_stats
        static_resources:
          listeners:
            - address:
                socket_address:
                  addr: 0.0.0.0
                  port_value: 8001
              filter_chains:
                - filters:
                    - name: envoy.filter.admin.access_log
                      config:
                        stats_sinks:
                          - name: admin_access_stats
                            static_resources:
                              listeners:
                                - address:
                                    socket_address:
                                      addr: 0.0.0.0
                                      port_value: 8001

static_resources:
  listeners:
    - address:
        socket_address:
          addr: 0.0.0.0
          port_value: 8080
      filter_chains:
        - filters:
            - name: envoy.http_connection_manager
              config:
                http_filters:
                  - name: envoy.http_router
                    config:
                      named_addresses:
                        service_1:
                          address:
                            socket_address:
                              addr: service-1.default.svc.cluster.local
                              port_value: 80
                        service_2:
                          address:
                            socket_address:
                              addr: service-2.default.svc.cluster.local
                              port_value: 80
                      route_config:
                        routes:
                          - match:
                              prefix: /
                            name: default_route
                  - name: envoy.grpc_stats
                    config:
                  - name: envoy.retry_service
                    config:
                      retry_types:
                        http:
                          retry_timeout: 30s
                          num_retries: 3
                          retry_backoff_factor: 1.0
                          retry_exponential_multiplier: 30000000000
          circuit_breakers:
            - detectors:
                - type: connections
                  threshold_s: 10
              action:
                type: disconnect
              stats_config:
                prefix: envoy.stream_manager.clients
                filter_scope: cluster

stats_sinks:
  - name: stats_sink
    static_resources:
      listeners:
        - address:
            socket_address:
              addr: 0.0.0.0
              port_value: 8001

service_clusters:
  service_1:
    type: strict_dns
    lb_policy:
      name: round_robin
    load_balancing_service_account:
      email: 'your-email'
      namespace: your-namespace
    socket_address:
      addr: service-1.default.svc.cluster.local
      port_value: 80

service_discovery:
  static_service:
    services:
      - name: service_1
        url: http://service-1.default.svc.cluster.local:80
